title: Develop solutions that use Blob storage
summary: Learn how to create Azure Blob storage resources, manage data through the blob storage lifecycle, and work with containers and items by using the Azure Blob storage client library V12 for .NET.

sections.title: Develop solutions that use Blob storage
sections.summary: Learn how to create Azure Blob storage resources, manage data through the blob storage lifecycle, and work with containers and items by using the Azure Blob storage client library V12 for .NET.

lessons.title: Explore Azure Blob storage
lessons.content_md:
Learn the core features and functionality of Azure Blob storage.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-azure-blob-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage the Azure Blob storage lifecycle
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage data availability throughout the Azure Blob storage lifecycle.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-azure-blob-storage-lifecycle/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage the Azure Blob storage lifecycle

lessons.title: Work with Azure Blob storage
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use the Azure Blob storage client library to create and update Blob storage resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/work-azure-blob-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop solutions that use Blob storage
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop solutions that use Blob storage**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
